calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-24-2005 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd
Off Calendar Sep-29-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Leticia Perez.
Charles Humbert, Esq. for Plaintiffs: Hameed Faidi and Inam Faidi, as Trustee of the Faidi Living Trust, dba Sunhill Enterprises, a California Living Trust.
Plaintiff's Witness: William Faidi was sworn and examined.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Robert Johnson as follows:
Damages $66,000.00
Prejudgment Interest $8,136.99
Costs $355.00, for a total of $74,491.99
Judgment signed in open court.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-16-2005 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-15-2005 Dismissal - No Appearance

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-22-2005 Set For Trial On Aug-29-05 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Aug-15-05 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 501
